<!--
Thanks for opening a PR! Please fill out the sections below — placeholders like __FILL_THIS_IN__ are required.

If this is a draft / WIP, mark it as a draft PR (drop-down next to the green "Create pull request" button).
-->

## Summary

__FILL_THIS_IN__: one or two sentences on what this PR does and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New content (quiz volume / code lab / simulation variant / survey)
- [ ] New game type
- [ ] Framework / templates / scaffolding improvement
- [ ] Docs / methodology
- [ ] Other: __FILL_THIS_IN__

## Which area(s) does this touch?

- [ ] Platform hub
- [ ] Analytics quiz
- [ ] Quantitative Marketing Methods quiz
- [ ] Brew & Budget
- [ ] RoboVault
- [ ] Code labs
- [ ] Survey games
- [ ] Auth / Supabase
- [ ] Docs / `references/`
- [ ] Other: __FILL_THIS_IN__

## Screenshots / demo

For any visible change, paste a before/after screenshot or short screen recording. Drag-and-drop into this textarea works.

## Source material (for new content PRs only)

If this PR adds a new quiz / lab / simulation, link to the reference material it was built from, and confirm:

- [ ] Reference material is in `references/<topic-or-source-id>/` (or linked to in a README if not redistributable)
- [ ] A `mapping.md` exists explaining which sections of the source map to which parts of the artifact
- [ ] You have the right to redistribute everything committed under `references/`

## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in demo mode (`python -m http.server 8000`, opened the affected page, ran the golden path)
- [ ] If this touches auth / leaderboards / persistence: tested against a real Supabase project too (see [SETUP.md](../SETUP.md))
- [ ] No new dependencies added (the no-build-step constraint is intentional — flag in the summary if you really need one)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Linked any related issue with "Closes #N" or "Refs #N"

## Notes for reviewers

__FILL_THIS_IN__ (anything you'd specifically like feedback on, or "n/a")
